textByHash.06c32c572f9b3abf96297e5c80853f21578dc4bc: Perhaps, human, perhaps... but if even our multicannon does not dent it, what chance is there really?
textByHash.0962a8d8bc18fbe26e44842d81782b85cdba2272: Oh, I'm sorry, I was mistaken. The meeting hasn't started yet, we need to wait a bit longer.
textByHash.0a295cabc577b5705f5f7f9699e3898c0358fe2e: He lives in his brother's house.
textByHash.13face5196e587bd8d728e6ccc898bcb17156af8: Well... I may require your services again. Are you interested in hearing more?
textByHash.1ac18b7b9029e131e93e4607c35c7122b9866840: Then perhaps they can finally end their impasse! Well, let's go to the meeting then!
textByHash.1bf60ac19e6496b6f3418a5fddc25939f7c5f66b: What do you say then? Do you want to help the Black Guard with this?
textByHash.1e3336a473c550a715dab858548e12f100ac97cc: I see... I cannot make that decision, I'm afraid. Speak to the director of Company, he may be able to help you.
textByHash.27801359015fb9fb846ded7efb08cafffcc49853: But let me introduce myself. I am Veldaban, son of Dondakan. I am the Commander of the Black Guard in Keldagrim.
textByHash.2cc05a775a91a58bdd1910a493565aab9078ad60: Excellent, good luck to you in your quest! May Guthix protect you!
textByHash.3011de7543382b3c4e75134a7d3f89029613b1ee: That's the problem. We don't know where they moved their headquarters to. But we may have one lead...
textByHash.35b3de24ccfef338817fee823ba261f6664eed8b: But he seems to know something about the Red Axe for some odd reason. He speaks of them sometimes in one of his many rants.
textByHash.369b8b721297b1a8ded2c1875b6ef3f90334160b: The other directors of the Consortium don't think so and are likely to expel the Red Axe completely anyway.
textByHash.397c4362ea252edfff080df22f764f0efa8f10bc: Ah, you see, the trophy is made of pure gold. And these dwarves in particular love gold.
textByHash.3db6bb14f49a9d21ea2e43e913306e21978bbe31: Very well then. Come back when you're ready, but hurry! You don't want to miss the meeting.
textByHash.3e541f0363b67afe42d791deb664f52b3f150e61: We dwarves don't know much about fishing, but a couple of our brothers at White Wolf Mountain want to win the competition.
textByHash.3ea77cf645ec3dd0b91c37117789444c9167cee1: You destroy our statue and you cannot be bothered to help rebuild it? By Guthix, you are rude... even for a human!
textByHash.3eace1498861b7fa849ff28df770dd561b071c5f: How are you getting on with rebuilding our statue?
textByHash.44d3daab353f897290a32ae5918de261d1c7c77c: Ah, so you are the one! I heard you banished a demon by defeating its avatar, most impressive.
textByHash.4ffe68ddf742c5cec9a4cad1d0822f5193c807d5: I'm sure there are many tasks that he needs doing.
textByHash.544cab03d7fac652e9dddcc533d803a702f04d39: , I thought you had something important to tell me?
textByHash.56c41949e849643f5058513e32e9f37b1a307bee: This human helped to rebuild the statue. He has deserved this honour, surely?
textByHash.59249fd56acc850734103abf6e13c2bf3b9114c9: Then perhaps you should try your hand at the Hemenster Fishing Contest.
textByHash.5b13ffd6bf531bcb5791611691e644f8f96bfe1f: Will you do this for us?
textByHash.620c20e8d7a8de166de11d0c92818b8e530b8c2f: Well then, , what is it going to be?
textByHash.6f870e062cf673d808ea5102a466d374cd630317: Oh, don't worry! I just need you to help him out while he rebuilds the statue.
textByHash.6faf1b63b67959188e895ecdf954212c4ede0c13: Errr, are you alright? Don't you have any important information about the Red Axe?
textByHash.70d1652cea312fec23277a72abb0b4cfe6735b5c: How goes the search for the Red Axe?
textByHash.75898a56d2d4f8e98fcd34dd59dbaf5cc91f845a: , are you absolutely sure? You might not get another chance like this. Are you sure you just want to read the summary of the meeting instead of seeing the actual meeting?
textByHash.78a3029ce3a9f4d29908987f6d00080f26158619: We need some more information about what the Red Axe is up to.
textByHash.845ae37b4c70b05e818f045776f112bfd19e7494: Veldaban, Commander of the Black Guard in Keldagrim, presenting himself to the Consortium with a guest.
textByHash.85ffc2d7a6bfb2de916c530bf414f4613b6c047b: Ah, so you're the one who knocked over the statue of our glorious king!
textByHash.943c5d6f92839741cb6098d97b431c98dab2c951: This human helped to rebuild the statue. They deserve this honour, surely?
textByHash.9494c56ee181674e697fd5b1f58f76240ca3b20f: I do have to warn you, this meeting may take a while. Do you want to attend the meeting personally, or do you simply want the minutes of the meetings so you can read what happened afterwards?
textByHash.9ab44cff0d78781437f1d305e60774bf7b010dff: Very well. Come back when you change your mind.
textByHash.9e1fd7e26c9452f0ce52f012bd48c720a4d4e463: Yes, you can speak to a dwarf at either side of the mountain.
textByHash.a111cf685bc74ac8b424df563932f3f9e70ceac6: But if he does indeed know something about the Red Axe or where their headquarters may be, we need to find out.
textByHash.a1d03aa72e5a92fbfb80cbdfeb56dc0da82427f1: I suppose we'll just have to wait and see what happens.
textByHash.b02dafa6745e9ed44b0087558d6676b26e4d8d4b: Don't worry, , I believe you. You must have been put under a spell of some sort to make you forget.
textByHash.bb40b1faf8e6eb6354a2bc7842e8e55f3c66e196: This human helped to rebuild the statue. She has deserved this honour, surely?
textByHash.bcc4a5c6de11cad7a559cb6c17c38017370d6a6e: Problem is, no one believes him. Everyone thinks he's completely mad. And perhaps they're right.
textByHash.beeb39d11e61d4ade76643cd5fe83c15818b8a19: Poor , I think you've been bewitched.
textByHash.c14bfa2555cb316d24421dc79ea2ea8ac08d045c: And? What of the Red Axe?
textByHash.c3c5cd6fa1a9338d3b920d647eed968da549335e: I want you to go and see the local sculptor and help him build a new statue.
textByHash.c8dc066147f2be7adb4aa0ec5af6ea069bcd9bf9: What happened, , did you finish your assignment?
textByHash.c9fd676949026ce4a287d64c9617e607201d31e0: Now, I need you to go to Blasidar, he is a sculptor who lives in Keldagrim-East.
textByHash.d195480fb7513dddd039115aa6dc875008a1f371: Happy to hear that! Let's hurry then, I think the meeting is already starting!
textByHash.d46c66b8f89a89e0e176b570ff617c0a6d0d011c: Get back to it as soon as you can, please!
textByHash.d56ac9c96a3dc9fd76b53dd30ec797aec1fb1db9: Now listen carefully. I have a task for you.
textByHash.d72ae747539b7795cb1da9252ffe3857bda8704b: In any case, he's a bit of a drunk these days. Well, when I say a bit, he's actually smashed all the time.
textByHash.d8735ade4f9ffb331b61de72584238bc6b4e4ebb: It's never happened before! At the moment it's unclear yet if they've left the Consortium as well. The directors are in turmoil!
textByHash.e10cbea1e28fcf0c54855cb335630a67c5f2ad6c: Well... not exactly now, no. I believe the Consortium has some other important business to attend to first. Come back in a minute or so.
textByHash.ec245a98e76e57deaadb6e58e7a1b3cc07e253e1: They've left the city! They were already boycotting the trade floor, but now they've completely left the city.
textByHash.ed013bdefb4e10ade20f1cac29ab5b807f198fa0: We haven't been ruled by a king for many a year... that statue was long overdue for replacement anyway. You're not under arrest, I merely wanted to talk to you.
textByHash.ed12de0ae30717ffbb580c00015f6dd2bd57b6b4: That's him, poor fellow. He didn't always used to be like that.
textByHash.f0a67e0ec4e1375e11891c74096d765f0046a491: Happy to hear that! Please go and check it out!
textByHash.f28954976ea121518f7f036bb447ecc6a94beea1: Very well. I'll give you the meeting minutes after it's finished.
textByHash.f59004d4655354201453ce08fd25a09dcddd3cbe: There is a dwarf, all the way to the northeast in Keldagrim-East. He talks about kebabs a lot. Don't suppose you've met him?
textByHash.fdfb13c883bc19df80e890447559230d66e345d8: Ah, he is forever trying to break open that rock of his, until his death I sometimes think.
textByHash.ff75c57f81ac5f164461fc479f01f70f00363480: No, not that. It's the Red Axe!
